creator: peter@taronga.com
text:
Have existing amd64/6.1 system, just replaced a dead motherboard with  
the M2A-VM, and this NIC is not recognized at all.

Will upgrade to amd64/6.2, see if that helps, but I notice that  
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=112643 claims this MB is  
supported, no problems, but this PR says otherwise. Any further  
success, Charles?
